purpose: Admin-only no-fetch selector for exact scored ETF daily 1Y fetchable gaps.

selector_policy.caveat: The exact readiness blocker is effective ETF detail daily_1y continuity: true StockAnalysis primary first, then the verified R2 active selection. Raw local YF is cross-check-only and is never treated as selected authority.

yf_local_crosscheck.caveat: Do not use the raw local YF-only count as the ETF readiness blocker; it is not R2-selected authority and over-selects versus the exact effective-detail continuity check.
